title: Custom Automation Template - where can I find it?
excerpt:
I created an automation “Needs Update”, saved it as a Template to use in another board. Now, I can’t find the template. I don’t see a “Templates” group anywhere. 
What am I missing?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created an automation “Needs Update”, saved it as a Template to use in another board. Now, I can’t find the template. I don’t see a “Templates” group anywhere.

What am I missing?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Never mind . . . . it is under “Custom” in the navigation pane.

To make it easier to find, the titles should be the same. Either “save as Custom Template” in the 3-dot options, or the navigation pane should say “Templates”
